steps.title: Test the mean statement
steps.content: The removed value, $76.2^{\circ}\text{F}$, is above the rest of the data shown in the histogram. Removing a value above the original mean lowers the mean, so statement I must be true.

steps.title: Test the median statement
steps.content: With $11$ values, the median is the $6$th ordered value. After removing the high value, the new median is the average of the $5$th and $6$th ordered values, which does not have to be less than the original median.

steps.title: Choose the true statements
steps.content: Only statement I must be true. The answer is A.
